hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=os.path.basename(d.get('file_path',d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))); sys.exit(2) if p.startswith('.env') and not p.endswith('.example') else None"

CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *grep*|*rg\ *|*ripgrep*|*find\ *|*fd\ *|*ack\ *|*ag\ *)   [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] &&   echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: knowledge graph at graphify-out/. For focused questions, run `graphify query \"<question>\"` (scoped subgraph, usually much smaller than GRAPH_REPORT.md) instead of grepping raw files. Read GRAPH_REPORT.md only for broad architecture context."}}'   || true ;; esac

python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); ti=d.get('tool_input',d); p=ti.get('file_path',''); is_s=any(f in p for f in ['schemas.py','supabase_writer.py']); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'SCHEMA CHANGE DETECTED: Invoke the schema-sync-checker subagent to verify Python<->Zod parity before finishing this task.'}})) if is_s else None"

python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); ti=d.get('tool_input',d); p=ti.get('file_path',''); is_p=any(x in p.replace('\\','/') for x in ['app/agents','app/graph','app/db']); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'PIPELINE FILE CHANGED: Invoke pipeline-reviewer subagent when done editing to check: graceful degradation, LLM factory usage, async safety, and Node boundary violations.'}})) if is_p else None"

python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); ti=d.get('tool_input',d); p=ti.get('file_path',''); is_e=any(f in p for f in ['synthesizer.py','signals.py']); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'EVAL-SENSITIVE FILE CHANGED: Run `uv run pytest tests/test_eval.py -v` after editing synthesizer.py or signals.py. Score must be >= 85 to merge.'}})) if is_e else None"
